title: Enforcement of orders and regulations by law enforcement authorities
doc_html:
§47.  Enforcement of orders and regulations by law enforcement authorities

The law enforcing authorities of the state and of the political subdivisions of the state are authorized and directed to enforce the orders, rules, and regulations made or issued pursuant to this Chapter.
doc_text:
§47.  Enforcement of orders and regulations by law enforcement authorities
The law enforcing authorities of the state and of the political subdivisions of the state are authorized and directed to enforce the orders, rules, and regulations made or issued pursuant to this Chapter.
